items.title_original: Why Distributed Systems Rarely Live at Pure CP or AP
items.title_neutral: Why Distributed Systems Rarely Live at Pure CP or AP
items.excerpt: The CAP Theorem only tells you what happens during a network partition. PACELC tells you when the network is working just fine, so you can choose between CP and AP. The trade-off between consistency and latency is a fundamental one for distributed systems.
